_publications._publicationTitle: Cognitive dysfunction in NF1 knock-out mice may result from altered vesicular trafficking of APP/DRD3 complex.

_contextSnippet: These mutant mice exhibit increased levels of activated Ras (Ras-GTP) and increased GABA mediated inhibition
details: Exhibit increased levels of activated Ras (Ras-GTP) and increased GABA mediated inhibition
